detail: TCN baseline full matrix completed for FD001-FD004, seeds 42/43/44, 12 jobs, 24 split-level metric rows, no NaN cells.
TCN improves representative-matrix RMSE best on FD002 and FD004 by point estimate, but overestimation-risk metrics still favor safety-oriented models where comparable data exist.
Full test suite passed after TCN implementation.
Draft PR #6 opened from a clean GitHub branch based on remote main.
Decision proxy generated from representative matrix plus TCN predictions: 336 seed-level rows, 112 summary rows, 16 best-by-cost cells, no NaN cells.
RMSE-best and decision-best agree in only 2/16 subset-lead-time cells under the declared cost proxy.
Critical-threshold sensitivity over 20/30/50/70 cycles: RMSE-best and critical-threshold-best agree in 2/16 subset-threshold cells.
Decision cost sensitivity over five declared cost schemas and four lead times: RMSE-best and cost-best agree in 10/80 scenario-subset-lead-time cells.
Generated claim-evidence map for TCN, decision proxy, and sensitivity claims: 8 claim rows, each mapped to CSV evidence and manuscript use.
TCN safety-loss small experiment is deferred: current claims are evaluation claims with sufficient evidence, and TCN safety-loss would open a new model-family ablation.
Integrated CSV-backed TCN, decision-proxy, and sensitivity claims into reports/paper/main.tex and regenerated paper_value_trace.csv plus figure_table_manifest.md.

details: Direct pdflatex/bibtex compile passed; arxiv_upload.zip refreshed with current main.tex and main.bbl.
